hero.lead: We are not just an association. We are a system that takes entrepreneurs from Kazakhstan, China and Central Asia all the way to a real deal. We operate in the corridor shaped since 2013 under the Belt and Road Initiative.
hero.title: UU — the business corridor of East and West

history.lead: This section shows UU's historical and strategic foundation — why now, and why this corridor.
history.title: Our history — the Belt and Road Initiative and UU
history.today_text: UU was founded right inside this historic corridor — as a real point of connection for entrepreneurs.
history.y2012: The Khorgos International Border Cooperation Centre opened — today it brings together goods from over 1,200 enterprises across more than 40 countries.
history.y2013: President Xi Jinping of the People's Republic of China first announced the "Silk Road Economic Belt" initiative to the world at Nazarbayev University in Astana. From that moment, Kazakhstan became a strategic corridor of the initiative.
history.y2026: A mutual visa-free regime was introduced between Kazakhstan and China — traffic through Khorgos reached a record level.

meta.description: UU's mission, history, values and governance structure. A trusted partner in the Kazakhstan–China corridor.
meta.title: About the Association — UU

mission.text: UU is an open ecosystem, built under the Belt and Road Initiative, that brings together entrepreneurs from Kazakhstan, China and Central Asia and accelerates trade and economic ties between them. Through the Khorgos hub we turn partnership from words into action.

partners.p1: Atameken National Chamber of Entrepreneurs of the RK
partners.p2: CCPIT · China Council for the Promotion of International Trade
partners.p6: Khorgos International Border Cooperation Centre Administration

v1.text: We are a real bridge connecting East and West.
v1.title: Connection

v2.text: Memorandum, agreement, promise — everything is confirmed on paper.
v2.title: Reliability

v3.text: We work through cross-cultural respect and open dialogue.
v3.title: Openness

v4.text: Not a meeting — a deal. Not a forum — a contract.
v4.title: Results focus

v5.text: We put the interests of Kazakhstani entrepreneurs first.
v5.title: National interest

vision.text: By 2030, UU will be the most trusted entrepreneurs' association in the Kazakhstan–China–Central Asia corridor: partnerships in 6 countries, expanded infrastructure built around the Khorgos hub, and thousands of real, completed deals.

why.b1: 01 — Many Kazakhstani entrepreneurs dream of entering the Chinese market but never start, lacking language, connections and a system of trust. UU closes that gap.
why.b2: 02 — The Belt and Road corridor has infrastructure, but using it at the entrepreneur level is complicated. UU shortens that path through the Khorgos hub.
why.b3: 03 — Central Asian entrepreneurs tend to approach China individually rather than together. UU builds a joint force through one shared platform.
why.b4: 04 — Official memorandums and ties often stay at the intergovernmental level and never reach the entrepreneur. UU turns these connections into real business opportunity.
why.heading: Answering the question "Why was UU founded?":

d4.text: Digital solutions, AI, automation. Technology transfer with China.

d5.text: Light industry, processing. Joint production projects.

d6.text: Online/offline retail, marketplaces. Wholesale trade through Khorgos.

d8.text: Training centres, Chinese-language preparation. Staff exchange programmes.

d9.text: Fundraising, fintech. The UU Investment network.

problem.p1: "I want to enter the Chinese market, but there's a language and communication barrier"
problem.p2: "I want to fly to China to find a partner — visas, logistics and time all add up"
problem.p3: "I don't know how an official memorandum or partnership even gets set up"
problem.p4: "The path into Central Asian markets is unclear"
problem.p5: "Certification and customs procedures for export are difficult"
problem.p6: "I'm looking for an investor but don't know who to trust"
problem.title: The entrepreneur's problem — UU's solution

solution.s1: UU's Khorgos office and translation/liaison service solve it directly
solution.s2: At the Khorgos hub — meetings, negotiations and product samples, all in a single day
solution.s3: You connect quickly through UU's existing memorandum with Chinese chambers
solution.s4: A 5-country regional partnership network, accessible through one platform
solution.s5: UU has experienced logistics and customs intermediaries
solution.s6: A network of vetted Chinese and domestic investors

what.title: What can you do at the Khorgos hub?

why.p1: The Khorgos International Border Cooperation Centre — a free trade zone operating since 2012, today bringing together goods from over 1,200 enterprises and more than 40 countries.
why.p2: Since 2026, a mutual visa-free regime has been in force between Kazakhstan and China — giving UU's partners a faster border crossing than ever before.
why.p3: UU's own office and hotel are located right in this zone — you negotiate as an official guest, without visa or logistics worries.
why.source: Source: official data on the Khorgos International Border Cooperation Centre and the Kazakhstan–China visa-free regime will be confirmed before final production.
